name: Chicken Saute with Wine Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown the chicken in the oil and butter. Remove the chicken and set aside.
Cook the onion in the pan until softened. Add the bouquet garni and chicken back to the pan.
Cover and cook gently for 20 minutes.
2. Stir in the vinegar. Simmer, uncovered, until reduced by half. Stir in the tomatoes and tomato puree.
Cover and cook for 5-10 minutes. Remove the chicken and keep warm. Discard the bouquet garni.
3. Reduce the cooking juices to a syrupy glaze. Stir in the stock and simmer until well reduced and flavored.
Return the chicken to the pan and gently turn to coat with the sauce.
